x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Alert-to-incident conversion provides Now Assist TSOM with historical linkage to learn remediation patterns.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.check_script: (function(){var gr=new GlideRecord("em_alert");gr.addNotNullQuery("incident");gr.query();var linked=gr.getRowCount();var gr2=new GlideRecord("em_alert");gr2.query();var total=gr2.getRowCount();var pct=total>0?Math.round((linked/total)*100):0;return{status:pct>=10?"ready":"needs_attention",actualValue:pct+"% of alerts generated incidents ("+linked+"/"+total+")",finding:pct<10?"Only "+pct+"% alert-to-incident conversion. Now Assist TSOM has no historical alert-incident linkage for AI remediation learning.":pct+"% alert-to-incident conversion -- Now Assist TSOM has historical data for AI pattern learning."};})()
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Configure alert management rules to automatically create incidents for actionable alerts.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_0603a33acfd903108935fb251d851cb6
sys_update_version.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <ai_justification><![CDATA[Alert-to-incident conversion provides Now Assist TSOM with historical linkage to learn remediation patterns.]]></ai_justification> <check_name>Alert-to-Incident Conversion Rate</check_name> <check_script><![CDATA[(function(){var gr=new GlideRecord("em_alert");gr.addNotNullQuery("incident");gr.query();var linked=gr.getRowCount();var gr2=new GlideRecord("em_alert");gr2.query();var total=gr2.getRowCount();var pct=total>0?Math.round((linked/total)*100):0;return{status:pct>=10?"ready":"needs_attention",actualValue:pct+"% of alerts generated incidents ("+linked+"/"+total+")",finding:pct<10?"Only "+pct+"% alert-to-incident conversion. Now Assist TSOM has no historical alert-incident linkage for AI remediation learning.":pct+"% alert-to-incident conversion -- Now Assist TSOM has historical data for AI pattern learning."};})()]]></check_script> <is_active>true</is_active> <is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive> <is_manual>false</is_manual> <module>AIOPS</module> <number>CHK0006075</number> <order>80</order> <remediation_guidance>Configure alert management rules to automatically create incidents for actionable alerts.</remediation_guidance> <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_created_on> <sys_id>0603a33acfd903108935fb251d851cb6</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count> <sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_updated_on> </x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
